Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class CampaignSettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.CampaignSettings2
public class CampaignSettings2 extends SObject

Java class for CampaignSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="CampaignSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AiAttributionSuccessMilestone" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AiAttributionTimeframe" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAccountsAsCmEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAiAttributionEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAutoCampInfluenceDisabledEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsB2bmaCampaignInfluence2Enabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsCampaignHistoryTrackEnabledEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsCampaignInfluence2Enabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsCampaignMemberTwcfEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsEkaiEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsSuppressNoValueCi2Enabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}CampaignSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
